claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: Canvas-and-Ink non-live explanatory content with an independently optional named complementary landmark.
semantics: Callout never adds alert, status, or aria-live behavior.
The default root is a neutral div; landmarkLabel intentionally renders a named aside.
A native heading, visible variant label, distinct symbol, and body preserve structure and non-color meaning.
Role and owned ARIA overrides are rejected at both the typed and runtime boundaries; empty composite content is invalid.
Omitting landmarkLabel renders the plain div baseline and emits no aside landmark or accessible landmark name.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
